title: ARCHIVED - Nunavut - 2020 Income tax package - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Nunavut - 2020 Income tax package
The following forms and schedules can be used to help you complete your tax return.
- Download or view your return and territorial forms Federal tax Income  Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet for the return Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return Nunavut tax Form  NU428 - Nunavut Tax Use this form to calculate your territorial  taxes to report on your return Optional: Nunavut  Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  NU428 - Nunavut Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Northwest  Territories tax

### Download or view your return and territorial forms
- Income  Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes
- Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet for the return Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet for the return Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Form  NU428 - Nunavut Tax Use this form to calculate your territorial  taxes to report on your return
- Optional: Nunavut  Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  NU428 - Nunavut Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Northwest  Territories tax
- Nunavut  Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet  NU428 - Nunavut Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Northwest  Territories tax
- Choose other forms and schedules that may apply Federal Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) in 2020 Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit Schedule 7 - RRSP and PRPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment for 2020 Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings Nunavut Form  NU479 - Nunavut Credits Schedule  NU(S2) - Territorial Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule  NU(S11) - Nunavut Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts

### Choose other forms and schedules that may apply
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) in 2020
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP and PRPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment for 2020
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings
- Form  NU479 - Nunavut Credits
- Schedule  NU(S2) - Territorial Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule  NU(S11) - Nunavut Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts
- Send us your paper return or use another method to file Print and mail your paper return Where to mail your paper T1 return Mailing addresses for: Canadian residents Non-residents File online or use another option Find a way to file your taxes Other methods to file like: Certified tax software
									(electronic filing) Authorize a representative Community volunteer tax clinic Discounter (tax preparer)
